init_hook: echo '💡 Try running: devbox run backend / devbox run frontend'
# Aliases locales de git (solo para este repo)

if [[ -t 0 && -t 1 ]]; then DEVX_CHOICE=""; if command -v gum >/dev/null 2>&1; then DEVX_CHOICE="$(gum choose --header "Selecciona tu DevX (sombrero):" "Ecosystem Admin (ERD)" "PMBOK App Dev (PMBOK)" "GitOps Control (GITOPS)")"; else echo "Selecciona tu DevX (sombrero):"; select opt in "Ecosystem Admin (ERD)" "PMBOK App Dev (PMBOK)" "GitOps Control (GITOPS)"; do DEVX_CHOICE="$opt"; break; done; fi; case "$DEVX_CHOICE" in "Ecosystem Admin (ERD)") export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="ERD" ;; "PMBOK App Dev (PMBOK)") export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="PMBOK" ;; "GitOps Control (GITOPS)") export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="GITOPS" ;; *) export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="${DEVBOX_ENV_NAME:-DEVBOX}" ;; esac; devx() { export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="$1"; }; fi

if command -v starship >/dev/null 2>&1; then export STARSHIP_CONFIG="$PWD/.starship.toml"; if [[ -n "${ZSH_VERSION:-}" ]]; then eval "$(starship init zsh)"; else eval "$(starship init bash)"; fi; else if [[ -n "${ZSH_VERSION:-}" ]]; then export PROMPT="(devbox ${DEVBOX_ENV_NAME}) ${PROMPT}"; else export PS1="(devbox ${DEVBOX_ENV_NAME}) ${PS1}"; fi; fi

scripts.backend: cd backend && chmod +x entrypoint.sh && poetry run ./entrypoint.sh python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
